title: Amtech L0490 9-in-1 Screwdriver Bit Set, Clear
features: High quality aluminium driver with magnetic head to hold bits securely
Includes 6 chrome vanadium steel bits (3 Slotted and 3 Phillips)
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Box Contains 1 x 6in1 screwdriver 3 x slotted screwdriver bit 3 x phillips screwdriver bit
